title: Why Ecosystems Matter More Than Founders
excerpt: We often idolize the lone genius, but the data suggests that the 'who' matters less than the 'where'. A look at how regional networks amplify success.

title: Measuring Weak Ties at Scale with Patent Data
excerpt: How I'm using a dataset of 2 million geocoded patents to map the flow of technical knowledge between European regions.

title: Beginning the PhD Journey at KU Leuven
excerpt: Reflections on moving to Belgium, joining the MSD research group, and defining my research questions for the next 4 years.
